_____________________________on the floor?

Yes, (They found some keys on the floor.)

_____________________________on the floor?

Yes, (There were some keys on the floor.)

_____________________________a pretty dress?

Yes, (She's got a pretty dress.)

_____________________________that telephone?

Yes, (He has to use that telephone.)

_____________________________ten minutes to get to the station?

Yes, (It took her ten minutes to get to the station.)

_____________________________much jem?

Yes, (They had a lot of jam.)

_____________________________him everything?

Yes, (I'm going to tell him everything.)
